---
title: "Quarto Brand Renderings"
syntax-highlighting:
  light: "github-light"
  dark: "github-dark"
brand:
  color:
    background:
      dark: "#333333"
      light: "#fafafa"
    foreground:
      dark: "#fafafa"
      light: "#333333"
    dark:
      dark: "#333333"
      light: "#fafafa"
    light:
      dark: "#fafafa"
      light: "#333333"
  typography:
    monospace-inline:
      color: foreground
      background-color: background
    monospace-block:
      color: foreground
      background-color: background
engine: markdown
---

This website showcases how Quarto's `brand` feature can style documents with different colour palettes and typography.
Each page uses an inline `brand` configuration in its YAML front matter to define colours, fonts, and light/dark mode settings.
The accompanying R and Python code then applies these brand settings to plots and tables.

Browse the examples to see how different combinations of colours and fonts affect the overall look and feel of a rendered Quarto document.

| Brand                                                                    | Palette                  | Base font     | Heading font     | Monospace font  |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------ | ------------- | ---------------- | --------------- |
| Brand 1 ([R](brands/brand-1/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-1/python.qmd)) | Nautical blues and teals | Chakra Petch  | Great Vibes      | JetBrains Mono  |
| Brand 2 ([R](brands/brand-2/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-2/python.qmd)) | Warm earth tones         | Lora          | Playfair Display | Fira Code       |
| Brand 3 ([R](brands/brand-3/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-3/python.qmd)) | Forest greens            | Source Sans 3 | Merriweather     | Source Code Pro |
| Brand 4 ([R](brands/brand-4/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-4/python.qmd)) | Sunset corals and roses  | Open Sans     | Bebas Neue       | IBM Plex Mono   |
| Brand 5 ([R](brands/brand-5/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-5/python.qmd)) | Cool greys and slate     | Inter         | Montserrat       | Space Mono      |
| Brand 6 ([R](brands/brand-6/r.qmd), [Python](brands/brand-6/python.qmd)) | Amber and bronze (local) | Crimson Text  | Abril Fatface    | Courier Prime   |

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

````markdown
{{< include /brands/_r.qmd >}}
````

## Python

````markdown
{{< include /brands/_python.qmd >}}
````

:::
